productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Pre L Boot White Sports Shoes
description: Take your game to the next level with these Pre L football boots from adidas. These comfortable kicks are engineered with superior cushioning with better shock absorption properties and great cleats which will keep your foot firm on hard ground surfaces. Upper Upper made from a super soft K-leather, used for added durability, lightness and a glove like Fit Synthetic overlays and reinforced overlay at the heel counter for enhanced shoe structure Lace-ups for better fit Asymmetric lacing with a velcro closure flap over the lacing Iconic three stripes symbolising the challenges that are seen ahead and goals that can be achieved on the sides Padded collar and textile shoe lining for better comfort Branding on the tongue and behind the collar Upper adhered to the outsole Outsole Cleats on the forefoot and the heel and flex grooves on the outsole Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
